hero.title: Caribbean flavors,
hero.subtitle: Peruvian-Colombian fusion by the sea. Fresh seafood, authentic ceviches and tropical cocktails in the heart of the Walled City.

historia.title: Where the Caribbean meets the Pacific
historia.p1: La Cevichería del Mar was born in 2013 from chef Andrés Maturana's passion for fusing two cuisines that always captured his heart: the vibrant Peruvian gastronomy with its leche de tigre and ajíes, and the marine richness of the Colombian Caribbean coast.
historia.p2: Set in a restored colonial mansion in the Historic Center of Cartagena, every dish is a tribute to two oceans. Local market ingredients, fine dining techniques and Caribbean warmth make every visit an unforgettable experience.

menu.title: The best of our menu
menu.subtitle: Fresh Caribbean ingredients, signature techniques and the authentic flavor of two cuisines.

reservas.subtitle: Enjoy a unique experience in the heart of Cartagena's historic center.

experiencia.title: More than a dinner
experiencia.card1Desc: Capacity for groups of up to 30 people. Custom menus, decoration and exclusive service for your celebration.
experiencia.card2Desc: 7 courses created by our executive chef. A sensory journey through the flavors of the Caribbean and Pacific.
experiencia.card3Desc: Curated selection by our certified sommelier. Wines from Colombia, Chile and Spain to accompany each dish.
